title: syntax error when immediately assigning a wire with unpacked dimension in single statement
body:
```
wire [1:0] a [1:0] = '{2'b00, 2'b11};
```

`verilator --lint-only`  reports `syntax error, unexpected '=', expecting ',' or ';'`

Only tested on 5.028. Unfortunately no easy way of testing newer version right now.


When splitting the code into separate `wire` and `assign` statements it works.
